---
title: "Schedule"
author: "Davi Moreira"
editor: visual
---

```{=html}
<style>
  .overflow-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Smaller font for compact display */
    width: 100%; /* Ensure the table fits within page width */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Tighter line spacing */
  }
  .overflow-table th, .overflow-table td {
    padding: 0.3rem; /* Reduce padding for compact layout */
    text-align: left; /* Left-align for readability */
    word-wrap: break-word; /* Wrap long text within cells */
    vertical-align: top; /* Align cell content to the top */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(1), .overflow-table td:nth-child(1) {
    width: 4%; /* Week column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(2), .overflow-table td:nth-child(2) {
    width: 9%; /* Date column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(3), .overflow-table td:nth-child(3) {
    width: 45%; /* Topic column */
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(4), .overflow-table td:nth-child(4) {
    width: 12%; /* Notebook column */
    text-align: center;
  }
  .overflow-table th:nth-child(5), .overflow-table td:nth-child(5) {
    width: 30%; /* Assessment / Notes column */
  }
  .below-table {
    font-size: 0.85rem; /* Match the font size of the table */
    line-height: 1.2; /* Match line height */
    margin-top: 1rem; /* Add spacing above the text */
  }
</style>
```

# Course Schedule

**Fall 2026 — Monday / Wednesday / Friday.** The 21-notebook arc is paced across the semester. Course content completes by late October; the **Undergraduate Research Conference poster presentation is Tue Nov 17** (all students present), and the **Poster-to-Product** build sprint runs through early December. Final-project milestone due dates are listed in the table below the schedule.

::: overflow-table
| Wk | Date | Topic | Notebook | Assessment / Notes |
|----|------|-------|----------|--------------------|
| 1 | Mon Aug 24 | Course launch + Launchpad (setup, Colab, Gemini, AI policy, Kaggle launch, Poster-to-Product preview) | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb00_launchpad_course_setup_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Colab Readiness Check |
| 1 | Wed Aug 26 | Predictive analytics fundamentals, EDA, and data splitting | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb01_eda_splits_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz |
| 1 | Fri Aug 28 | Data setup and preprocessing pipelines | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb02_preprocessing_pipelines_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Participation |
| 2 | Mon Aug 31 | Regression metrics and baseline modeling | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb03_regression_metrics_baselines_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · 3-sentence Evaluation Note |
| 2 | Wed Sep 2 | Linear regression: features, interactions, diagnostics | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb04_linear_features_diagnostics_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Participation |
| 2 | Fri Sep 4 | **Lecture — Regularization (Ridge & Lasso)** + project proposal | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb05_regularization_project_proposal_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz |
| 3 | Mon Sep 7 | *No class — Labor Day* | — | — |
| 3 | Wed Sep 9 | Logistic regression: probabilities, boundaries, pipelines | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb06_logistic_pipelines_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Participation |
| 3 | Fri Sep 11 | Classification metrics: confusion matrix, ROC/PR, business costs | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb07_classification_metrics_thresholding_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Threshold Recommendation |
| 4 | Mon Sep 14 | Resampling and cross-validation (k-fold + Student's *t* CIs) | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb08_cross_validation_model_comparison_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Participation |
| 4 | Wed Sep 16 | Hyperparameter tuning + feature engineering + leakage detection | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb09_tuning_feature_engineering_project_baseline_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz |
| 4 | Fri Sep 18 | Tuning/leakage hands-on lab + project studio | — | Project work · *M01 Proposal due Sun Sep 20* |
| 5 | Mon Sep 21 | Midterm review + practice studio (casebook self-study) | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb10_midterm_casebook_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Midterm prep |
| 5 | Wed Sep 23 | **MIDTERM EXAM — in person, in class** | — | **Midterm (graded)** |
| 5 | Fri Sep 25 | Decision trees: interpretable models with sharp edges | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb11_decision_trees_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Participation |
| 6 | Mon Sep 28 | Random forests: bagging, OOB, feature importance | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb12_random_forests_importance_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Participation · *M02 Outline due Sun Sep 27* |
| 6 | Wed Sep 30 | Gradient boosting: performance with discipline | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb13_gradient_boosting_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Participation |
| 6 | Fri Oct 2 | Project studio + watch-ahead | — | Project work |
| 7 | Mon Oct 5 | Model selection + test-set ceremony + monitoring | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb14_model_selection_protocol_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · *M03 Draft Abstract due Sun Oct 4* |
| 7 | Wed Oct 7 | Model-selection lab + Milestone 03 walkthrough + project studio | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb15_milestone_03_walkthrough_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Project studio |
| 7 | Fri Oct 9 | Time-series forecasting: walk-forward CV, lag features | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb16_time_series_forecasting_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · *M05 Conference Application due Sun Oct 11* |
| 8 | Mon Oct 12 | *No class — Fall Break* | — | — |
| 8 | Wed Oct 14 | Data communication & poster design | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb17_data_communication_poster_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Draft Poster Outline + Abstract |
| 8 | Fri Oct 16 | Competition workflow: notebook to Kaggle submission | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb18_competition_workflow_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | submission.csv to Kaggle |
| 9 | Mon Oct 19 | Deep learning (PyTorch + when-to-use + LLM lab) — **content complete** | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb19_deep_learning_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Concept Quiz · Four-Question Rubric · *M06 Simple Model due Sun Oct 18* |
| 9 | Wed Oct 21 | Poster launch studio + course wrap / reflection bridge | [![Open In Colab](https://colab.research.google.com/assets/colab-badge.svg)](https://colab.research.google.com/github/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/blob/main/notebooks/nb20_final_submission_peer_review_student.ipynb){target="_blank"} | Poster launch |
| 9 | Fri Oct 23 | Poster studio — build poster from M06/M08 results | — | Poster build |
| 10 | Mon Oct 26 | Poster studio — figures, narrative, abstract | — | Poster build · *M08 Complex Models due Sun Oct 25* |
| 10 | Wed Oct 28 | Poster studio — structured peer review | — | Poster peer review |
| 10 | Fri Oct 30 | Poster studio — finalization | — | Poster draft |
| 11 | Mon Nov 2 | Poster polish + Kaggle leaderboard push | — | *M09 Poster First Draft due Sun Nov 1* |
| 11 | Wed Nov 4 | Dry-run presentations | — | Presentation practice |
| 11 | Fri Nov 6 | Final poster QA | — | Poster QA |
| 12 | Mon Nov 9 | Final poster QA → submission | — | **M10 Final Poster due Tue Nov 10** (7 days before URC) |
| 12 | Wed Nov 11 | Presentation practice | — | Presentation practice |
| 12 | Fri Nov 13 | Logistics + presentation coaching | — | Presentation coaching |
| 13 | Mon Nov 16 | Final presentation prep | — | *M11 Planning + M12 LinkedIn due Sun Nov 15* |
| 13 | **Tue Nov 17** | **Undergraduate Research Conference — Poster Presentation (all students present)** | — | **POSTER PRESENTATION** |
| 13 | Wed Nov 18 | Poster-to-Product kickoff — scoping, partner framing, AI-assistant assignment | — | P2P scope |
| 13 | Fri Nov 20 | Poster-to-Product — data engineering + model validation | — | P2P build |
| 14 | Mon Nov 23 | Course Case Competition — finalize & conclude (online work session) | — | **Kaggle final submission due Sun Nov 29** |
| 14 | Wed Nov 25 | *No class — Thanksgiving vacation* | — | — |
| 14 | Fri Nov 27 | *No class — Thanksgiving vacation* | — | — |
| 15 | Mon Nov 30 | Poster-to-Product — deployment + partner checkpoint | — | P2P deploy |
| 15 | Wed Dec 2 | Poster-to-Product — usability testing + iteration | — | P2P usability |
| 15 | Fri Dec 4 | Poster-to-Product — executive brief drafting | — | P2P brief |
| 16 | Mon Dec 7 | Poster-to-Product — showcase preparation | — | Showcase prep |
| 16 | Wed Dec 9 | **Poster-to-Product SHOWCASE** (partners + feedback) | — | **P2P SHOWCASE** |
| 16 | Fri Dec 11 | Course wrap — peer evaluation, reflection survey | — | **Intra-group Peer Evaluation** · **REFLECTION SURVEY** (required for completion) |

:::

::: below-table

## Final Project Milestones

Group capstone (groups of four). Deliverables are due **Sundays, 11:59 PM** (the project track runs alongside the MWF sessions), except the final poster, pinned to **Tue Nov 10** — 7 days before the conference. Full instructions and rubrics: [`_final_project/2026F/`](https://github.com/davi-moreira/2026F_predictive_analytics_QM474/tree/main/_final_project/2026F). *(Milestone numbering follows the reference documents; M04 / M07 / M13 are intentionally unused.)*

| # | Milestone | Due |
|---|-----------|-----|
| M00 | Group Contact Confirmation | Sun Sep 6 |
| M01 | Initial Project Proposal | Sun Sep 20 |
| M02 | Expanded Project Outline | Sun Sep 27 |
| M03 | Project Draft Abstract | Sun Oct 4 |
| M05 | Applying to the Conference | Sun Oct 11 |
| M06 | Simple Model & Performance Evaluation | Sun Oct 18 |
| M08 | More Complex Models & Performance Evaluation | Sun Oct 25 |
| M09 | Poster First Draft | Sun Nov 1 |
| M10 | Final Poster Submission (`NN.pdf`) | **Tue Nov 10** |
| M11 | Poster Presentation Planning | Sun Nov 15 |
| M12 | LinkedIn Post Invitation | Sun Nov 15 |
| — | **URC Poster Presentation (required)** | **Tue Nov 17** |
| — | Intra-group Peer Evaluation | Fri Dec 11 |

## Core Course References

- **James, Witten, Hastie, Tibshirani.** *An Introduction to Statistical Learning* (ISLP) + Python labs. Download: [https://www.statlearning.com/](https://www.statlearning.com/){target="_blank"}
- **Hastie, Tibshirani, Friedman.** *The Elements of Statistical Learning* (ESL).
- **Provost, Fawcett.** *Data Science for Business*.
- **Pedregosa et al.** "Scikit-learn: Machine Learning in Python." *JMLR*.
- **scikit-learn User Guide** (pipelines, preprocessing, model selection, metrics, inspection).
- **Chip Huyen.** *Designing Machine Learning Systems* (deployment thinking, monitoring).

:::
